boundaries.description: Overlay manifest. References only in-overlay content files via relative paths (no '..', no absolute). Conforms to the host schema; never redefines host semantics (Conformist).
Principle and gate-consultation markdown. Plain markdown, no frontmatter. Domain guidance only; must not re-teach System2 mechanics (REQ-DP-008).

Per-(agent,anchor) prompt-section markdown. Plain markdown, no frontmatter. Each file is self-contained guidance for one anchor; C1 (pipeline-engineering) and C2 (ML-data) language kept distinct per file.
Auxiliary agent definitions (markdown + YAML frontmatter). Read-only, advisory, pipeline:false. Must not reference content files or host internals.
Smoke tests. May read the manifest, content files, and the host schema/anchor-map/composer (read-only, for validation). The only module permitted to reference the host.
